title: Battle of New Cov

{{Quote|Well…I suppose the only one that really qualifies would be a short but violent battle off New Cov in the Churba sector.|Leia Organa Solo, to Han Solo|<ref name="DFR" />}}
A short but violent '''battle''' occurred near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Cov/Legends|New Cov]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="DFR" /> A [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] forces' [[Raid on Tangrene|raid]] on [[Tangrene]], Iblis met the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] Alliance member [[Borsk Fey'lya]]. The Bothan agreed to support [[Garm Bel Iblis's movement]] and set up a supply line through New Cov.<ref name="DFRSb" />

The battle began when four Bothan [[Starship/Legends|starships]] under the command of Fey'lya found an Imperial [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] investigating New Cov in the [[Churba sector/Legends|Churba]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. The Bothan ships kept the Star Destroyer busy until a [[Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]] arrived to reinforce them.<ref name="DFR" /> The battle allowed Fey'lya and Bel Iblis to keep their alliance secret for [[Standard year/Legends|years]].<ref name="DFRSb" /> In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'', in which the battle of [[New Cov]] is mentioned, to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].</ref> [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] spoke of the battle while discussing Fey'lya's war activities.<ref name="DFR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle was first mentioned in the [[1992]] novel ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'', which was written by [[Timothy Zahn]] as the second installment of the ''[[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy]]''.<ref name="DFR" />
